across.clue: an idea problem situation etc that you discuss or write about
To move information to your computer from a computer system or the Internet.
Information in a form that a computer can use.
To give all your attention to the thing you are doing.
someone that you do a particular activity with
A talk to a group of people about a particular subject especially at a college or university.
To continue existing or happening for or until a particular time.

down.clue: if you are welcome or a welcome visitor at a place people are pleased that you are there
an area of a town or country.
cloth especially when it is used for making things such as clothes or curtains.
people in general living together in organised communities with laws and traditions controlling the way they behave towards one another
an advantage you get from a situation.
to move closer to someone or something.
a period of 100 years usually counted from a year ending in -00.
a company that owns aircraft and takes people or goods by plane from one place to another.
Connected to or available through a computer or a computer network especially the Internet.
if a ball or other object bounces or if you bounce it it hits a surface then immediately moves away from it.
the roads or paths that you use when you go from one place to another.
